title: matthiola incana subsp. melitensis
intro: Matthiola incana subsp. melitensis, also known as the Cypriot stock or hoary stock, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Matthiola incana subsp. melitensis is often prepared as a tea or used in infusions, and its leaves and flowers are also used in herbal remedies, such as tinctures and salves.
